summary: Classified the hydrated cluster without GitHub mutation. The original representative #35447 is already closed; #26370 is the best surviving full cron ownership tracker but is security-sensitive and must be quarantined. Linked #49175 is also security-sensitive. Validator preflight requires #58966 to be treated as security-sensitive as well, so it is quarantined rather than kept closed. The remaining hydrated refs are already closed and receive no close/comment/merge/fix action.
